title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
